name: Wordle
description: A word guessing game. Guess the 5-letter word in 6 tries. Each guess must be a valid English word, validated via dictionary API.

tools.name: start_game
tools.description: Start a new Wordle game. A random 5-letter target word is chosen. The player has 6 guesses.

hardMode.description: If true, revealed hints must be used in subsequent guesses. Defaults to false.

tools.name: guess_word
tools.description: Submit a 5-letter word guess. The word is validated against a dictionary API. Returns letter-by-letter results: 'correct' (green), 'present' (yellow), or 'absent' (gray).

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Get the current game status including all guesses made so far and their results.
